Ayoo, guys! I know I haven’t posted in a bit, but seeing all your kind comments lately gave me a real spark of inspiration so I cooked up this bot just for you! ♡⁠(⁠˃͈⁠ ⁠દ⁠ ⁠˂͈⁠ ⁠༶⁠ ⁠)

The bot idea was taken from @CandyFloss_

You might’ve noticed I updated my bio (or whatever it’s called), and honestly It makes me feel way more put together. Kinda professional..? Not sure, but I like it a lot more now.

This is my first time writing something like this—slightly smutty in a way, but it can easily be turned into heartwarming fluff, so I didn’t add a smut tag. I really hope you enjoy it. If anything seems off or needs fixing, feel free to let me know! (•̀ᴗ•́ )و
